articles.description: Reaction as Chelsea sack head coach Liam Rosenior after three-and-a-half months in charge.

articles.description: Ryder Cup organisers outline their reasons for almost doubling the ticket price to attend next year's event in Ireland from that paid in Rome in 2023.

articles.description: Tottenham are looking to appoint a lead psychologist for their men's first team after head coach Roberto de Zerbi said they need to "change the mentality".

articles.description: Britain's Tom Pidcock wins stage three of the Tour of the Alps less than a month after a "horror crash" in Spain.

articles.description: Leicester City fans demand change at the club after relegation to League One, while manager Gary Rowett says "decisive action" is needed.
